Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

The discharge Q over a small rectangular weir is known to depend upon the head H over the weir, the weir height h, gravity g, width of weir L and fluid properties density ρ, dynamic viscosity μ and surface tension σ. The number of dimensionless terms are _________.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
the number of variable (n) = 8
number of primary variable (m) = 3
number of dimensionless terms (n – m) = 5

Solution
